name: Care free world
description:
"A world where no one really cares about anything you do"

.

.

It’s just a normal world, but you can do anything wild, personal stuff, explicit, whatever and nobody reacts. People, like strangers or coworkers, just let it happen, no questions, no stopping you. Make your own story, go as far as you want, in a regular, everyday world.
creator: Xeot
